zh.Painswick, Gloucester, England: 英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾潘斯維其可
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Richard Osborne於1513年出生在英國肯特阿福德時，他的父親Sir Richard Osbourne Knight25歲，母親Lady Elisabeth Flydane Duchess of Ashford25歲。他於1535年與Jane Broughton在英國英格蘭肯特阿福德結婚。他們至少是6個兒子的父母。他去世於1581年8月11日在他的家鄉享年68歲，埋葬在英國肯特阿福德。

zh-hans.Painswick, Gloucester, England: 英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾潘斯維其可
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Richard Osborne于1513年出生在英国肯特阿福德时，他的父亲Sir Richard Osbourne Knight25岁，母亲Lady Elisabeth Flydane Duchess of Ashford25岁。他于1535年与Jane Broughton在英国英格兰肯特阿福德结婚。他们至少是6个儿子的父母。他去世于1581年8月11日在他的家乡享年68岁，埋葬在英国肯特阿福德。

nameMeanings.name: Osborne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Osbern, partly from late Old English Ōsbern, an Anglicized form of Old Norse Ásbiǫrn (from áss ‘god’ + biǫrn ‘bear’), but more usually from Norman use of the cognate ancient Germanic Ōsbern. Osbern was often treated as an alternative form of Osbert. For pet forms see Hoskin and Opie . The surname has also been established in Ireland (Waterford, Tipperary) since the mid 16th century.

variants.name: Oborne
meanings: habitational name from Oborne in Dorset. The placename derives from Old English wōh ‘twisted, crooked’ + burna ‘spring, stream’.
possibly from the Middle English personal name Obern, an Anglo-Norman French form of Osbern (see Osborne ).

variants.name: Hoskin
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Osekin with prosthetic H-, a pet form of Anglo-Norman French names beginning with Os- (particularly Osbert, as well as Osbern, and Osmund) + the Flemish diminutive suffix -kin. All three personal names were current in medieval Cornwall or Devon; see Osborne , Osmond , and Opie (a pet form of Osbert). Old English Ōsbeorn, Ōsbeohrt, and Ōsmund may also have contributed in a minor way to Middle English usage; Middle English Oswald is another possible source, but the name was very rare in the late 14th century. For the excrescent initial H-, compare Herrick .

variants.name: Oborn
meanings: English (Somerset): habitational name chiefly from Oborne in Dorset, or perhaps occasionally from Howbourne Farm in Hadlow Down, Sussex, Woburn in Bedfordshire, Woburn Park in Surrey, or Wooburn in Buckinghamshire. The placenames derive from Old English wōh ‘twisted, crooked’ + burna ‘spring, stream’, except Wooburn in Buckinghamshire, which is of uncertain etymology.
English (of Norman origin): perhaps from the Middle English personal name Obern, an Anglo-Norman French form of Osbern (see Osborne ).

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Richard Osborne was born in 1513, in Ashford, Kent, England, his father, Sir Richard Osbourne Knight, was 25 and his mother, Lady Elisabeth Flydane Duchess of Ashford, was 25. He married Jane Broughton in 1535, in Ashford, Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons. He died on 11 August 1581, in his hometown, at the age of 68, and was buried in Ashford, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Richard Osborne est né en 1513, à Ashford, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Sir Richard Osbourne Knight, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Lady Elisabeth Flydane Duchess of Ashford, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Jane Broughton en 1535, à Ashford, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils. Il est décédé le 11 août 1581, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterré à Ashford, Kent, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Richard Osborne 1513 in Ashford, Kent, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Richard Osbourne Knight 25 und seine Mutter Lady Elisabeth Flydane Duchess of Ashford 25. Er hat 1535 in Ashford, Kent, England, United Kingdom Jane Broughton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne. Er starb am 11. August 1581 im Alter von 68 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Ashford, Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard Osborne è nato il nel 1513 nel Ashford, Kent, England, il suo padre, Sir Richard Osbourne Knight, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Lady Elisabeth Flydane Duchess of Ashford, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Jane Broughton nel 1535, nel Ashford, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli. Morì il 11 agosto 1581, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolto a Ashford, Kent, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Osborneが1513年にイギリスケントアシュフォードで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Osbourne Knightは25歳，母Lady Elisabeth Flydane Duchess of Ashfordは25歳であった。1535年にイギリスイギリスケントアシュフォードでJane Broughtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子の親であった。彼は1581年8月11日に故郷で68歳で死去し，イギリスケントアシュフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Osborne(이)가 1513년 영국 켄트 애스h퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Richard Osbourne Knight(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Elisabeth Flydane Duchess of Ashford(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1535년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 애스h퍼드에서 Jane Broughton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1581년 8월 11일 그의 고향에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 애스h퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard Osborne nasceu em 1513, em Ashford, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Richard Osbourne Knight, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Lady Elisabeth Flydane Duchess of Ashford, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Jane Broughton em 1535, em Ashford, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos. Ele faleceu em 11 de agosto de 1581, em sua cidade natal, com 68 anos, e foi sepultado em Ashford, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Richard Osborne родился в 1513 г. в местности ашфорд, кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Richard Osbourne Knight было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Elisabeth Flydane Duchess of Ashford, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Jane Broughton в 1535 г. в местности ашфорд, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей. Он умер 11 августа 1581 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 68 лет и был похоронен в местности ашфорд, кэнт, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Richard Osborne nació en 1513, en Ashford, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Richard Osbourne Knight, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Lady Elisabeth Flydane Duchess of Ashford, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Jane Broughton en 1535, en Ashford, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos. Murió el 11 de agosto de 1581, en su pueblo, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultado en Ashford, Kent, Inglaterra.
